findings.title: CVE-2026-21643 — FortiClient EMS SQL Injection Under Active Exploitation
findings.summary: Critical SQL injection in FortiClient EMS 7.4.4 allows unauthenticated RCE via HTTP Site header; actively exploited since March 26 with ~2,000 instances exposed globally.

findings.title: CVE-2026-3055 — Citrix NetScaler SAML Memory Overread Added to CISA KEV
findings.summary: CISA added CVE-2026-3055 to KEV on March 30 with 3-day deadline; active exploitation confirmed leaking admin session IDs from SAML IDP appliances, public PoC available.

findings.title: CVE-2025-53521 — F5 BIG-IP Reclassified from DoS to Critical RCE, Webshells Deployed
findings.summary: F5 reclassified CVE-2025-53521 from high-severity DoS to critical RCE; attackers are now deploying webshells on unpatched BIG-IP devices in the wild.

findings.title: DarkSword iOS Exploit Kit — Russian APT Star Blizzard (FSB) Now Adopted
findings.summary: FSB-linked Star Blizzard APT adopted the DarkSword iOS exploit kit, expanding its use from Ukraine-targeted UNC6353 operations to broader Western intelligence collection against government, education, and financial targets.

noted.summary: Remote code execution in OpenWebUI AI tool with ZDI-published PoC on GitHub; limited enterprise deployment currently.
Integer overflow RCE patched in March Patch Tuesday; unconfirmed GitHub claim suggests exploitation on fully patched systems.
